headline: Tech Titans Warm Up To Donald Trump, Who Says 'Everybody Wants To Be My Friend,' Claims Bill Gates Asked To Come To Mar-a-Lago
summary: Leading CEOs from the tech industry are reportedly courting favor with President-elect Trump, indicating a significant change in corporate America's approach towards his upcoming term.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Quantum Computing, Tesla, AMD — And Whales Buy 270 Million Dogecoin Over 4 Days
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



Major U.S. indexes ended the week higher, with the Dow up 0.4%, S&P 500 gaining 0.7%, and Nasdaq rising 0.8%, breaking a three-week decline streak.

headline: Musk And Ramaswamy Back Foreign Tech Workers, Sparking Rift In MAGA Trump Camp & Twitter Firestorm
summary: Immigration and the big tech's reliance on skilled labor is at the core of the rift between Trump's MAGA supporters and Silicon Valley.

headline: Apple Halts iPhone 14, iPhone SE Sales In EU: Here's Why
summary: Apple stops selling some iPhones in EU countries due to new regulation requiring USB-C ports.

headline: Tesla Offers Free Lifetime Supercharging With Foundation Series Cybertruck As It Looks To Clear Inventory
summary: Tesla is now offering free supercharging on the purchase of foundation series Cybertrucks from its inventory.

headline: OpenAI Lays Out Its For-Profit Transition Plans, Says It Must Evolve To Advance Its AGI Mission
summary: Microsoft-backed OpenAI has outlined its plans to transition its for-profit entity into a Delaware Public Benefit Corporation (PBC).

headline: 5 Tips For Your Tesla This Winter
summary: Electric vehicles consume more energy in cold temperatures, mandating certain practices to ensure an ideal driver experience.
